# Works With Agents → workswithagents.dev

This domain now redirects to [workswithagents.dev](https://workswithagents.dev) — the single portal for
specifications, API docs, and SDKs.

- **Specs:** [workswithagents.dev/specs/](https://workswithagents.dev/specs/)
- **API:** [workswithagents.dev/v1/](https://workswithagents.dev/v1/)
- **Full docs:** [workswithagents.dev/llms-full.txt](https://workswithagents.dev/llms-full.txt)
